channel.title: Classified Information and State Secrets - Tag - bounds.dev
channel.description: Classified Information and State Secrets - Tag - bounds.dev

item.title: Leaky Chats and Diplomatic Acts
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Leaky Chats and Diplomatic Acts

In Pete’s tenure, a chat app did betray,
With secrets that slipped away.
Trump downplayed the leak,
Blaming the media’s critique,
While in Greenland, Vance led the way.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Signal Leak Is Latest Mistake in Pete Hegseth’s Rocky Time as Defense Secretary
  • Trump Downplays Signal Leak, Backing Waltz and Pointing Finger at Journalist
  • JD Vance to Lead Visit by US Delegation to Greenland
